name: Lifestyle Communities Limited
analysis: LIC's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 29% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.2× the 20-day average) — real participation. Trade idea: entry A$5.1100, stop A$4.7421, target A$5.8000 (1.88:1) — then trail it.
